---
name: code-review
description: Reviews diffs for correctness, style, and Bazel wiring before approving.
---

# Code Review (GitHub Copilot)

Skill that GitHub Copilot can attach to a chat session for diff review.
This proves the `.github/skills/<name>/SKILL.md` discovery pattern works
on the Copilot platform alongside the existing `.claude/skills/` tree.

Activate when reviewing pull requests or staged diffs.
